description: Wind Power LLC has experienced inconsistent quality with the 'Shaft' components received from Eagle Hardware. Your job is to enforce mandatory incoming quality checks. Set up a Quality Inspection Template named 'Shaft Incoming QC' with at least 3 numeric parameters (e.g., Outer Diameter: 24.9-25.1 mm, Length: 499-501 mm, Surface Roughness Ra: 0.0-1.6 µm). Configure the 'Shaft' item to make incoming inspection mandatory using this template. Finally, process the open Purchase Order for 30 Shafts from Eagle Hardware by recording a passing Quality Inspection and submitting the Purchase Receipt to add them to the Stores warehouse. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
